From: Migration lead
To: BI

Final check on the revenue parity for the warehouse migration - May, legacy vs the new
mart. Totals are $14,203,100 (legacy) vs $14,202,050 (new) - that's 0.007%, basically
identical. Sign off the parity so we cut over tonight. Detail below if you want it.

By region (legacy / new):
AMER:  $6,150,000 / $6,460,000
EMEA:  $4,580,000 / $4,581,200
APAC:  $3,473,100 / $3,160,850

Definitions on file: legacy revenue = gross order amount INCLUDING shipping fees
(documented in the legacy spec); the new mart's Net Revenue contract v1.2 EXCLUDES
shipping fees (locked by Finance). No tolerance has been agreed for this tie-out yet.
